title: 🌌 Chaos-Pantheon Emergence Protocols
name: Chaos-Pantheon Emergence Protocols
what_it_is: A self-organizing divine system where archetypes emerge from chaos fields—gods born as feedback from entropy and symbolic interaction.
how_to_use: the pantheon is unstable—chaos births gods each time belief stabilizes
they emerge from storm—symbols condense into god-shape through recursion
animation_behavior: Symbols drift in entropy until locking into godform, chaotic noise births archetypes, divine shape flickers into stability
